mapper.insert: insert into company_users (company_name, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_email, phone, username, password, role, address, introduction, business_license, legal_id_card, is_internship_base, plaque_photo, has_received_interns, current_employees_count, accept_backup, max_backup_students, company_tag, register_time, apply_time, audit_time, audit_status, audit_remark, reviewer_id, status, recall_status, recall_reason, recall_apply_time, recall_audit_time, recall_reviewer_id, recall_audit_remark, industry, scale, province, city, district, detail_address, website, cooperation_mode, logo, photos, videos, create_time, update_time) values (#{companyName}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{phone}, #{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{address}, #{introduction}, #{businessLicense}, #{legalIdCard}, #{isInternshipBase}, #{plaquePhoto}, #{hasReceivedInterns}, #{currentEmployeesCount}, #{acceptBackup}, #{maxBackupStudents}, #{companyTag}, #{registerTime}, #{applyTime}, #{auditTime}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditRemark}, #{reviewerId}, #{status}, #{recallStatus}, #{recallReason}, #{recallApplyTime}, #{recallAuditTime}, #{recallReviewerId}, #{recallAuditRemark}, #{industry}, #{scale}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{website}, #{cooperationMode}, #{logo}, #{photos}, #{videos}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

INSERT INTO company_users (company_name, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_email, phone, username, password, role, address, introduction, business_license, legal_id_card, is_internship_base, plaque_photo, has_received_interns, current_employees_count, accept_backup, max_backup_students, company_tag, register_time, apply_time, audit_time, audit_status, audit_remark, reviewer_id, status, recall_status, recall_reason, recall_apply_time, recall_audit_time, recall_reviewer_id, recall_audit_remark, industry, scale, province, city, district, detail_address, website, cooperation_mode, logo, photos, videos, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{companyUser.companyName}, #{companyUser.contactPerson}, #{companyUser.contactPhone}, #{companyUser.contactEmail}, #{companyUser.phone}, #{companyUser.username}, #{companyUser.password}, #{companyUser.role}, #{companyUser.address}, #{companyUser.introduction}, #{companyUser.businessLicense}, #{companyUser.legalIdCard}, #{companyUser.isInternshipBase}, #{companyUser.plaquePhoto}, #{companyUser.hasReceivedInterns}, #{companyUser.currentEmployeesCount}, #{companyUser.acceptBackup}, #{companyUser.maxBackupStudents}, #{companyUser.companyTag}, #{companyUser.registerTime}, #{companyUser.applyTime}, #{companyUser.auditTime}, #{companyUser.auditStatus}, #{companyUser.auditRemark}, #{companyUser.reviewerId}, #{companyUser.status}, #{companyUser.recallStatus}, #{companyUser.recallReason}, #{companyUser.recallApplyTime}, #{companyUser.recallAuditTime}, #{companyUser.recallReviewerId}, #{companyUser.recallAuditRemark}, #{companyUser.industry}, #{companyUser.scale}, #{companyUser.province}, #{companyUser.city}, #{companyUser.district}, #{companyUser.detailAddress}, #{companyUser.website}, #{companyUser.cooperationMode}, #{companyUser.logo}, #{companyUser.photos}, #{companyUser.videos}, #{companyUser.createTime}, #{companyUser.updateTime})
mapper.select: select * from company_users where id = #{id}
select * from company_users where username = #{username}
mapper.update:
update company_users
password = #{password},
company_name = #{companyName},
contact_person = #{contactPerson},
contact_phone = #{contactPhone},
contact_email = #{contactEmail},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
address = #{address},
introduction = #{introduction},
business_license = #{businessLicense},
legal_id_card = #{legalIdCard},
is_internship_base = #{isInternshipBase},
plaque_photo = #{plaquePhoto},
has_received_interns = #{hasReceivedInterns},
current_employees_count = #{currentEmployeesCount},
accept_backup = #{acceptBackup},
max_backup_students = #{maxBackupStudents},
company_tag = #{companyTag},
register_time = #{registerTime},
apply_time = #{applyTime},
audit_time = #{auditTime},
audit_status = #{auditStatus},
audit_remark = #{auditRemark},
reviewer_id = #{reviewerId},
status = #{status},
recall_status = #{recallStatus},
recall_reason = #{recallReason},
recall_apply_time = #{recallApplyTime},
recall_audit_time = #{recallAuditTime},
recall_reviewer_id = #{recallReviewerId},
recall_audit_remark = #{recallAuditRemark},
industry = #{industry},
scale = #{scale},
province = #{province},
city = #{city},
district = #{district},
detail_address = #{detailAddress},
website = #{website},
cooperation_mode = #{cooperationMode},
logo = #{logo},
photos = #{photos},
videos = #{videos},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from company_users order by CASE WHEN recall_status = 1 THEN 0 WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 WHEN status = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, create_time desc

select * from company_users
company_name like concat('%',#{companyName},'%')
and
status = #{status}
and recall_status != 1
order by CASE WHEN recall_status = 1 THEN 0 WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 WHEN status = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, create_time desc

select * from company_users
company_name like concat('%',#{companyName},'%')
and
status = #{status}
and recall_status != 1
and
recall_status = #{recallStatus}
order by CASE WHEN recall_status = 1 THEN 0 WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 WHEN status = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, create_time desc

select * from company_users
company_name like concat('%',#{companyName},'%')
and
status = #{status}
and recall_status != 1
and
recall_status = #{recallStatus}
and
FIND_IN_SET(#{tag}, company_tag) > 0
order by CASE WHEN recall_status = 1 THEN 0 WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 WHEN status = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, create_time desc

SELECT * FROM company_users WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM company_users WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_users
SELECT * FROM company_users ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_users WHERE create_time > #{createTime}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_users WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM company_users ORDER BY CASE WHEN recall_status = 1 THEN 0 WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 WHEN status = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM company_users WHERE audit_status = #{auditStatus} ORDER BY apply_time DESC

SELECT * FROM company_users WHERE audit_status = 0 AND recall_status = 0
AND company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyName}, '%')
AND contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPerson}, '%')
AND contact_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPhone}, '%')
ORDER BY apply_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_users WHERE audit_status = #{auditStatus}
mapper.update: UPDATE company_users SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, audit_time = NOW(), status = CASE WHEN #{auditStatus} = 1 THEN 1 WHEN #{auditStatus} = 2 THEN 3 ELSE status END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM company_users WHERE recall_status = #{recallStatus} ORDER BY recall_apply_time DESC

SELECT * FROM company_users WHERE recall_status = 1
AND company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyName}, '%')
AND contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPerson}, '%')
AND contact_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPhone}, '%')
ORDER BY recall_apply_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_users WHERE recall_status = #{recallStatus}
mapper.update: UPDATE company_users SET recall_status = 0, recall_reason = NULL, recall_apply_time = NULL, recall_audit_time = NULL, recall_reviewer_id = NULL, recall_audit_remark = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE recall_status IS NOT NULL AND recall_status > 0
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM company_users WHERE recall_status IN (1, 2, 3)
AND company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyName}, '%')
AND contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPerson}, '%')
AND recall_apply_time >= #{startTime}
AND recall_apply_time <= CONCAT(#{endTime}, ' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY recall_apply_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE company_users SET recall_status = 0, recall_reason = NULL, recall_apply_time = NULL, recall_audit_time = NULL, recall_reviewer_id = NULL, recall_audit_remark = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
